narrative:
North Twp/Vil (precinct in Harrison County) has 889 registered voters, with 61.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.3%, a clear Republican lean of 7.8 percentage points.
